ValidationRule.description: To Check Entity is Inactive when Payout is approved.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Status__c), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Status__c), 'Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Status__c, 'Approved')), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Status__c), 'Cancelled-Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Status__c, 'Cancelled'))), leaseworks__Accounting_Enabled__c, leaseworks__Entity__r.leaseworks__Inactive__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unable to proceed with approval/cancellation. Entity on the Payout is inactive. Please link it to an active entity to continue.
